General.Name: Hinge Health, Inc.
General.Description: Hinge Health, Inc. focuses on building a health system that scales and automates the delivery of care using technology. It designs its platform to address musculoskeletal system care (MSK), including acute injury, chronic pain, and post-surgical rehabilitation. The company also provides personalized and automated MSK care through AI-powered motion tracking technology and a proprietary electrical nerve stimulation wearable device. It primarily serves self-insured employers. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
General.Address: 455 Market Street, San Francisco, CA, United States, 94105
